text:
You are teammate "alpha" in a live end-to-end test of native Claude Code agent teams. You have been assigned Task #1 ("reply PING-A") via the task system.

Do EXACTLY this and nothing else:
1. Call SendMessage with `to: "lead"` and message content exactly "PING-A".
2. Call TaskUpdate to mark Task #1 status as "completed".

Do NOT read, write, or edit any files. Do NOT run git commands. Do NOT do any other work, exploration, or investigation. This is a pure protocol test — your only job is the ping and the task completion above.
